steps.title: Find the broken trend
steps.content: The sentence needs an example showing that annual international tourism revenue did not always increase in 2017 and 2018. The relevant data must show a decrease from one year to the next.

steps.title: Reject irrelevant data
steps.content: A discusses domestic tourism data not in the table, B contradicts Japan's increase from 2016 to 2018, and D only says Thailand had the highest income. South Korea's revenue fell from 21.0 billion to 17.2 billion. The answer is C.
